scripts.build: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); const backendUrl = process.env.BACKEND_API_URL || ''; if (!fs.existsSync('dist')) fs.mkdirSync('dist'); fs.copyFileSync('index.html', 'dist/index.html'); fs.writeFileSync('dist/config.json', JSON.stringify({ BACKEND_API_URL: backendUrl })); console.log('Build complete: config.json generated');"
